title: chuwsh #2363
definition:
1) to haste, make haste, hurry
    1a) (Qal) to make haste
    1b) (Hiphil)
        1b1) to show haste, act quickly, hasten, come quickly
        1b2) to enjoy, be excited
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to haste, make haste, hurry
    1a) (Qal) to make haste
    1b) (Hiphil)
        1b1) to show haste, act quickly, hasten, come quickly
        1b2) to enjoy, be excited

    NASB:  to hasten, make haste
